name: Sourdough Sams
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Stir the dry mixture into the liquid ingredients until just combined.
3. Roll out the batter and cut with a regular donut cutter.
4. Heat oil in a deep fryer to 390 degrees F (200 degrees C).
5. Fry the doughnuts until golden brown, turning occasionally.
6. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
7. Dust with powdered sugar or cinnamon sugar before serving.
8. Store any leftover doughnuts in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days, or freeze for longer storage. Thaw and fry as needed.
NOTE:
These doughnuts are virtually greaseless. You can make several batches at once and freeze them for later use. They keep well in the freezer and taste great after thawing.
